description_long: This object is a large, mounted automatic rifle or heavy machine gun, designed for stationary use in urban defense or military scenarios. It features a robust, angular body with a long, reinforced barrel and a wide, circular base supported by three extended stabilizing legs. The main housing is constructed from dark, metallic materials with visible bolts, panels, and mechanical details, suggesting durability and advanced engineering. The barrel is encased in a protective shroud, and the rear section includes what appears to be an ammunition feed or loading mechanism. The top of the rifle has a mounted sighting system, likely for targeting, and the entire assembly is painted in a camouflage pattern with green, gray, and black tones. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing stability, firepower, and resistance to harsh urban environments.
description: A heavy, tripod-mounted automatic rifle with a long barrel, angular body, and camouflage finish, designed for stationary defense. Features include a reinforced base, advanced sighting system, and robust mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the long barrel, central housing, and the three stabilizing legs extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the barrel, the detailed mechanical housing, and the mounted sight on top.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the housing, possible ammunition feed, and the symmetrical spread of the tripod legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the barrel, side panels, and the sighting system, mirroring the other side.
